notes: Send all 6 starting villagers to sheep. Keep producing villagers from the Town Center without stopping.
Use your Scout to find more sheep and herd them back to the Town Center.
Send the next 3 villagers to wood and build a Lumber Camp near a forest.
Build a House early so you do not get housed.
Put new villagers on food. Move to berries with a Mill once your sheep run low.
Keep the Town Center making villagers the entire game.
Add villagers to wood. You need plenty of wood to build the second Town Center.
Build another House to stay ahead of population.
Once you have about 400 food and 200 wood, click up to the Feudal Age using the Council Hall or Abbey of Kings landmark.
Continue gathering while the age-up completes.
When you reach Feudal Age, gather wood for the second Town Center.
Build a Barracks and add a few Spearmen or Archers if your opponent is aggressive.
Use 6 villagers to build a second Town Center on a fresh food or gold source.
After it is built, send those villagers back to gathering resources.
Make villagers from BOTH Town Centers at the same time to boom your economy.
Put a few villagers on gold to prepare for the Castle Age.
Research economy upgrades like Wheelbarrow and Double Broadaxe at the Mill and Lumber Camp.
Keep both Town Centers producing villagers.
Once you have about 1200 food and 1200 gold, age up to the Castle Age.
Your strong economy lets you build a big army to take control of the map.
